candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows high conviction (>=90%) but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, the current setup has no historical analog and should be sized down or vetoed regardless of conviction strength.
testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size *= 0.5 (or veto if session != London Grade A)
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
